use_cases: Form submission triggers for user actions
Call-to-action buttons in landing pages or dashboards
Navigation action triggers with asChild composition
Interactive UI controls with multiple visual variants
ai_summary: A reusable atomic Button component built with Radix UI Slot for flexible composition, styled with Tailwind CSS and managed through class-variance-authority for variant control. Supports multiple visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, sm, lg, icon), making it suitable for any web application requiring standardized button interactions.
